notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 15-19 in generated discovery row order.

creation::forced_movement.issue: The detector matched pulling shadow material from the Shadowfell, but no creature or object is moved by force in the scene.
creation::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Track as object creation/source flavor rather than forced movement.

creation::vision_light_sound.issue: The created object's form and material must be something the caster has seen, but runtime lacks seen-before eligibility fields for object creation.
creation::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add creation eligibility fields for seen form and seen material.

creation::created_object_or_structure.issue: The spell creates a vegetable or mineral object up to a 5-foot cube, with material-dependent duration, shortest duration for mixed materials, material-component failure if reused in other spells, and +5 feet cube scaling; runtime stores this only in prose.
creation::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object creation fields for material classes, size cap, material duration table, mixed-material shortest duration, material-component failure, and slot scaling.

danse-macabre::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Animated corpses gain a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier; runtime lacks controlled-undead stat modifier fields.
danse-macabre::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned/animated creature attack and damage bonus fields sourced from spellcasting ability modifier.

danse-macabre::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The caster can use a bonus action to mentally command all created undead within 60 feet with the same command; runtime lacks command action economy and command range fields.
danse-macabre::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-creature command fields for bonus action, mental command, same-command multi-control, and range.

danse-macabre::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched corpses the caster can see within range, which is ordinary targeting visibility rather than a vision/light/sound effect.

danse-macabre::summon_or_controlled_enti.issue: The spell animates up to five Small or Medium corpses as zombies or skeletons, controls them with bonus-action mental commands, gives default defensive behavior, persists orders until task completion, and scales by two corpses per higher slot; runtime is generic utility prose.
danse-macabre::summon_or_controlled_enti.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated undead fields for corpse eligibility, count, size, form choice, stat block reference, command economy, default behavior, task persistence, and slot scaling.

danse-macabre::status_or_state_change.issue: Each corpse becomes undead and later becomes inanimate again when the spell ends; runtime lacks typed corpse-to-undead and undead-to-inanimate state transitions.
danse-macabre::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/corpse state transition fields for animation and reversion.

danse-macabre::conditional_ending.issue: The created undead remain under control until the spell ends, then become inanimate; runtime lacks spell-end reversion/lifecycle data.
danse-macabre::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated creature lifecycle ending fields.

dawn::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Constitution save and end-turn Constitution save are now represented as DAMAGE effects with half-damage success outcomes.
dawn::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
dawn::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding an on_end_turn_in_area DAMAGE effect.

dawn::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: If the caster is within 60 feet of the cylinder, they can move it up to 60 feet as a bonus action; runtime lacks created-area reposition action fields.
dawn::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained area movement fields for controller range, action cost, and movement distance.

dawn::vision_light_sound.issue: The cylinder's bright light and sunlight are now represented as a light UTILITY effect.
dawn::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new light field required for this pass.
dawn::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a UTILITY light effect.

dawn::conditional_ending.issue: The cylinder lasts until the normal spell duration ends; there is no special conditional ending.

destructive-wave::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses affected creatures in the Emanation and chooses Radiant or Necrotic for the second damage component; runtime has the second damage as Radiant/Necrotic text but lacks typed target-choice and damage-type choice fields.
destructive-wave::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chosen-creatures-in-area targeting and linked damage-type choice fields.
destructive-wave::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetChoice and damageTypeChoice data.

destructive-wave::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: The Constitution save and half-damage outcome now apply to both the Thunder damage and the Radiant/Necrotic damage component.
destructive-wave::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack/save field required for this pass.
destructive-wave::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a second DAMAGE effect.

destructive-wave::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the Emanation area; the spell is an instantaneous damage/status effect, not a ward or alarm.

destructive-wave::status_or_state_change.issue: The failed-save Prone condition is now represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect gated by the Constitution save.
destructive-wave::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new status field required for this pass.
destructive-wave::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by adding a Prone STATUS_CONDITION effect.

dispel-evil-and-good::attack_or_save_mod.issue: The incoming attack disadvantage from Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead is now represented, but Dismissal's Charisma save and planar send-home branch remain prose-only.
dispel-evil-and-good::attack_or_save_mod.recommendedTemplateChange: Add special-function action fields for Dismissal with Charisma save and planar movement outcome.

dispel-evil-and-good::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched the Dismissal function's visible target within 5 feet, which is action target eligibility rather than a vision/light/sound effect.
dispel-evil-and-good::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Track under special action target fields.

dispel-evil-and-good::travel_or_planar_m.issue: Dismissal can send a qualifying creature back to its home plane, or Undead to the Shadowfell and Fey to the Feywild if not on their home plane; runtime lacks typed planar return/destination fields.
dispel-evil-and-good::travel_or_planar_m.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar dismissal fields for qualifying creature types, home-plane return, and type-specific fallback destinations.

dispel-evil-and-good::social_or_knowledg.issue: Break Enchantment removes possession, Charmed, or Frightened caused by qualifying creature types; runtime lacks typed source-filtered condition/possession removal fields.
dispel-evil-and-good::social_or_knowledg.recommendedTemplateChange: Add source-filtered removal fields for possession and conditions caused by specific creature types.

dispel-evil-and-good::status_or_state_ch.issue: Break Enchantment and Dismissal can remove possessed, Charmed, Frightened, or relocate a creature; only the attack-roll disadvantage is typed.
dispel-evil-and-good::status_or_state_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: Add special-function status removal and dismissal fields.
dispel-evil-and-good::status_or_state_ch.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime specialFunctions data for Break Enchantment and Dismissal.
